edges.evidence_quote: The United States Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) considers the family a faction of the Bonanno crime family of New York City
edges.context: FBI considers Rizzuto family a faction of Bonanno family.

edges.evidence_quote: Nicolo Rizzuto ... established the organization in the 1970s as part of the Sicilian faction of the Montreal-based Cotroni crime family.
edges.context: Rizzuto family originated as part of Cotroni family's Sicilian faction.

edges.evidence_quote: An internal war within the Cotroni family broke out by the late 1970s which resulted in the death of acting captain Paolo Violi and his brothers, allowing the Rizzutos to overtake the Cotronis as the city's preeminent crime family.
edges.context: Rizzuto family fought and overtook Cotroni family in a war.

edges.evidence_quote: The Rizzuto family along with their allies in the Cuntrera-Caruana clan were major players in the economy of Venezuela
edges.context: Rizzuto family allied with Cuntrera-Caruana clan in Venezuela.

edges.evidence_quote: Rizzuto was the mediator who oversaw the peace among the Hells Angels, the Mafia, street gangs, Colombian cartels, and the Irish mobs such as the West End Gang.
edges.context: Rizzuto mediated peace with Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: Rizzuto was the mediator who oversaw the peace among the Hells Angels, the Mafia, street gangs, Colombian cartels, and the Irish mobs such as the West End Gang.
edges.context: Rizzuto mediated peace with West End Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: An internal war within the Cotroni family broke out by the late 1970s which resulted in the death of acting captain Paolo Violi and his brothers, allowing the Rizzutos to overtake the Cotronis as the city's preeminent crime family.
edges.context: Rizzuto family overtook Cotroni family after an internal war in the late 1970s.

edges.evidence_quote: The United States Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) considers the family a faction of the Bonanno crime family of New York City
edges.context: FBI considers Rizzuto family a faction of Bonanno family.

edges.evidence_quote: On one side there is the Mafia, on the other side is the 'Ndrangheta. We will make both them happy and we will do the bridge.
edges.context: Rizzuto family and 'Ndrangheta were both to be satisfied in the bridge project.

edges.evidence_quote: He should send those people on motorcycles [the Hells Angels]. He has to send the French people, with the bikes
edges.context: Rizzuto family was to use Hells Angels as couriers for money.

edges.evidence_quote: a 300 kilogram shipment of a total 1,300 kilograms of cocaine, co-organized by Rizzuto family confidant, Francesco Del Balso and West End Gang member, Richard Griffin, was intercepted
edges.context: Rizzuto family and West End Gang co-organized a cocaine shipment in 2005.

edges.evidence_quote: Sources claimed his murder was retribution for his involvement in the murder of Nick Rizzuto Jr. in December 2009
edges.context: Rizzuto family killed Ducarme Joseph of the 67s as retribution for Nick Rizzuto Jr.'s murder.

edges.evidence_quote: The 67s gang formed in the Saint-Michel district of Montreal, Quebec, Canada in the late 1980s and are associated with the Crips gang.
edges.context: The 67s are associated with the Crips gang.

edges.evidence_quote: The United States Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) considers the family a faction of the Bonanno crime family of New York City
edges.context: FBI considers Rizzuto family a faction of Bonanno family.

edges.evidence_quote: Nicolo Rizzuto ... established the organization in the 1970s as part of the Sicilian faction of the Montreal-based Cotroni crime family.
edges.context: Rizzuto family originated as a faction of the Cotroni family.

edges.evidence_quote: An internal war within the Cotroni family broke out by the late 1970s which resulted in the death of acting captain Paolo Violi and his brothers, allowing the Rizzutos to overtake the Cotronis as the city's preeminent crime family.
edges.context: Rizzuto family fought and overtook Cotroni family in an internal war.

edges.evidence_quote: the Musitano family [for example] was aligned with Rizzuto, which offered protection
edges.context: Musitano family was aligned with Rizzuto family for protection.

edges.evidence_quote: The enemies included 'criminal groups in Hamilton, Buffalo, Montreal and elsewhere, including the Luppino and Papalia crime gangs,' according to the National Post.
edges.context: Luppino crime gang is an enemy of Musitano family.

edges.evidence_quote: The enemies included 'criminal groups in Hamilton, Buffalo, Montreal and elsewhere, including the Luppino and Papalia crime gangs,' according to the National Post.
edges.context: Papalia crime gang is an enemy of Musitano family.

edges.evidence_quote: As part of operation Project Colisee in 2006, Del Balso was convicted of gangsterism and conspiracy to import and sell cocaine to the Hells Angels.
edges.context: Rizzuto confidant Del Balso conspired to sell cocaine to Hells Angels.
